heading: Credit to appropriations of money collected for meals at Indian Health Service facilities
label: 1638d Credit to appropriations of money collected for meals at Indian Health Service facilities
text: Money before, on, and after , collected for meals served at Indian Health Service facilities will be credited to the appropriations from which the services were furnished and shall be credited to the appropriation when received.September 30, 1994
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1995, and not as part of the Indian Health Care Improvement Act which comprises this chapter.
